question_text: Question 44: Let { X n } n ≥ 1 { X n } n ≥ 1

options.B: e a sequence of independent random variables such that X n X n has Poisson distribution with mean λ n λ n , where λ n = λ + 1 2 n λ n = λ + 1 2 n , n ≥ 1 n ≥ 1 , and λ > 0 λ > 0 is an unknown parameter. Which one of the following statements is true?
options.A: 1 n ∑ n i = 1 X i 1 n ∑ i = 1 n X i is an unbiased estimator of λ λ
options.C: ∑ n i = 1 X i ∑ i = 1 n X i is a consistent estimator of λ λ
options.D: 1 n 2 ∑ n i = 1 X i 1 n 2 ∑ i = 1 n X i is an unbiased estimator of λ λ
